data.title: Stellantis, Volkswagen Stocks Tumble As US EV Tax Credits Disappear
data.description: European automakers' stocks dropped due to loss of U.S. tax credits for some PHEVs under Biden's act; Tesla's Cybertruck qualifies for $7,500 tax credit.

data.title: Reddit Hailed As 'AI-Learning Goldmine': Despite Buying Pressure, There's Bullish Potential
data.description: Reddit stock surged over 125% in the past six months, but with a modest 10% dip over the last month. Here's why investors are buzzing.

Why Is Clean Tech Company N2OFF Stock Jumping Premarket Friday?
data.description: N2OFF's stock surges after signing LOI with SBSI for renewable energy projects in Italy. N2OFF will hold approximately 70% ownership in the projects.
